PowerShell($ws = "c:\\Users\\pn-t-kojima\\Documents\\novel-write\\_workspace"; $ctxPath = "$ws\\CONTEXT.md"; $arcPath = "$ws\\archive\\CONTEXT_archive.md"; $enc = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\); $ctx = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($ctxPath, [Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $m1 = $ctx.IndexOf\("## 2026-07-06"\); $m2 = $ctx.IndexOf\("## 2026-07-09"\); $head = $ctx.Substring\(0, $m1\); $part = $ctx.Substring\($m1, $m2 - $m1\).TrimEnd\(\) + "`n"; $tail = $ctx.Substring\($m2\); $arc = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($arcPath, [Text.Encoding]::UTF8\).TrimEnd\(\) + "`n"; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($arcPath, $arc + "`n---`n`n" + $part, $enc\); [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($ctxPath, $head + $tail, $enc\); "archived chars=$\($part.Length\) / new ctx chars=$\(\($head + $tail\).Length\)")
